titleStmt.title: SII 31.32: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 32. (A.R. No. B 233 of 1938.) GAṄGAVARAM, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab setup on the back side of the Ankālamma shrine.
It is dated Śaka 1179, Piṅgala, Āshāḍha, śu. 15 Thursday, corresponding to June 28, 1257 A.D.

It registers the gift of the village called [Gaṅgā]puramu situated in Mulki nāḍu by Kamalādēvi, the wife of Gaṇḍapendāru Gangaya Sāhiṇi to their preceptor Īśānagurudēva as tax free grant (sarvabhādhā-parihāramugānu) for the maintenance of daily worship and offering to the god Puḥpēśvara Mahādēva at Puḥpagiri. It further states that the gift has been handed over to the son (name not specified) of Īśānagurudēva to maintain the gift (Odayalai naḍapam galavāru) Īśānagurudēva seems to the preceptor to Gōlakī maṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīŌṁnamaḥ śivāya[ḥ .*] namaḥttuṁga śira
cchuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravētrailōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāyasaṁbhavē . svasti samastamahāmaṁḍaḷa
rājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara parama mahēsvara kākatipuravarādhī
svara śrīsvayaṁbhudēvara divyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka calama¨rtti gaṁḍa mūru
rāyarajagadāḷa rāyagajakēsariśrī gaṇapati dēvamahārājula vijaya
rājyōdaya [Aṣṭhādaśava¨rṣē] svastiśrī manmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara ma
peṭṭi śrī gaṇapati rā
ya dēva mūru rāya ja gaṁ
dāḷa śrīmatu gaṁḍapeṁḍāra gaṁgaya sāhiṇi tasyā¨rddhaṁgi
lakṣmīkāmaladēviyu śaka varuṣaṁ
bulu 1179 nēṭi piṁgaḷa saṁvatsara Āśā(ṣā)ḍha śu 15 guruvā
ra munāṁḍu puḥṣpagiri puṣpēśvara mahā dēvarakunu Aṁga
raṁgabhōgānaku mulikināṁṭilōnanu gaṁgāpuramu
Iśāṁnyagurudēvara hastāna dhārā pū¨rva kaṁbu sēsiri sa
¨rvva bādhāparihāramugānu sdhānānakunu Anēka kālakālāṁ
ttarānaṁkunnu Iśāṁnyagurudēvaradīkṣa putrulē Ō
ḍayalai naḍapaṁgalavāru . pratiṣṭhāsamayamuṁdu vri
ttiveṭṭaṁci konna mahājanāla nāmāṁkitamu .
Digital edition of SII 31.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
